---
title: "CV"
---

It can be found [here](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/l18uw3upmax74laxyauru/cv.pdf?rlkey=0r7sqftvb8vppabevqo1iuh0z&dl=0). 
<!-- You can also find out this CV template [here](https://github.com/skyzh/chicv) written by Typst, a very simplified and prospective ducumention language.  -->
